creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
The new stable version 1.2.69 is available at Debian-lenny.

Fix: 

-- 
WBR, bsam--vA3guJPa4VCPCdN3O0rOlv8HtA7MoJIeEKblDo2Nv8LhK4rn
Content-Type: text/plain; name="logcheck.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="logcheck.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/security/logcheck/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.28
diff -u -r1.28 Makefile
--- Makefile	18 Dec 2009 01:31:18 -0000	1.28
+++ Makefile	25 Dec 2009 17:00:00 -0000
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	logcheck
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.54
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.69
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_DEBIAN_POOL}
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}
@@ -38,7 +37,7 @@
 		ignore.d.workstation violations.d violations.ignore.d
 DOCS=		AUTHORS CHANGES CREDITS LICENSE TODO docs/README*
 PORTDOCS=	${DOCS:T}
-MAN8=		logcheck.8 logtail.8
+MAN8=		logcheck.8 logtail.8 logtail2.8
 
 PATCH_LIST=	extra-patch-debian__logcheck.cron.d \
 		extra-patch-docs__logcheck.8 \

Index: files/extra-patch-src__logcheck.in
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/security/logcheck/files/extra-patch-src__logcheck.in,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 extra-patch-src__logcheck.in
--- files/extra-patch-src__logcheck.in	18 Dec 2009 01:31:19 -0000	1.1
+++ files/extra-patch-src__logcheck.in	25 Dec 2009 17:00:00 -0000
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@
 -STATEDIR="/var/lib/logcheck"
 -LOGFILES_LIST="/etc/logcheck/logcheck.logfiles"
 -LOGFILE_FALLBACK="/var/log/syslog"
--LOGTAIL="/usr/sbin/logtail"
+-LOGTAIL="/usr/sbin/logtail2"
 +RULEDIR="%%ETCDIR%%"
 +CONFFILE="%%ETCDIR%%/logcheck.conf"
 +STATEDIR="/var/db/logcheck"
@@ -172,7 +172,7 @@
  fi
  
  # Create the secure temporary directory or exit
--TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d -p /tmp logcheck.XXXXXX) \
+-TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d -p ${TMP:-/tmp} logcheck.XXXXXX) \
 -    || TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d -p /var/tmp logcheck.XXXXXX) \
 +TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/logcheck.XXXXXX) \
 +    || TMPDIR=$(mktemp -d /var/tmp/logcheck.XXXXXX) \
